recommendations.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
recommendations.overview: Yet to fulfill their rock and roll destiny, the stakes are higher than ever for the now middle-aged Bill and Ted who set out on a new adventure when a visitor from the future warns them that only their song can save life as we know it.

recommendations.title: Fun with Dick and Jane

recommendations.title: RED

recommendations.title: Now You See Me
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent and an Interpol detective track a team of illusionists who pull off bank heists during their performances and reward their audiences with the money.

recommendations.title: Ad Vitam
recommendations.overview: When he and his pregnant wife are attacked in their home, a former elite agent becomes trapped in a deadly manhunt tied to his own painful past.

recommendations.title: The Cowboy Way
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Thriller, Western
recommendations.overview: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.
